item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll use only the procdork MCP to locate the chat summary mart, inspect its description, and run a read-only count comparison. I won’t inspect the workspace.

item.text: The MCP exposes one stable mart: `main.mart_chat_summary`. It contains four nullable `BIGINT` count metrics plus first/last session timestamps; I’m now querying only those count fields as a bar chart.

arguments.sql:
SELECT 'session_count' AS metric, session_count AS count
FROM main.mart_chat_summary
UNION ALL
SELECT 'message_count' AS metric, message_count AS count
FROM main.mart_chat_summary
UNION ALL
SELECT 'event_count' AS metric, event_count AS count
FROM main.mart_chat_summary
UNION ALL
SELECT 'cited_source_count' AS metric, cited_source_count AS count
FROM main.mart_chat_summary
arguments.title: Chat summary count metrics

item.text:
`main.mart_chat_summary` is the available chat summary mart. It contains four nullable `BIGINT` count metrics—`session_count`, `message_count`, `event_count`, and `cited_source_count`—plus nullable `TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE` fields `first_session_at` and `last_session_at`.

Chat summary count metrics

![Chat summary count metrics](https://procdork.vercel.app/charts/gAAAAABqUsmI-rs9HOSswYqCpRbiEND6cJL8mX8eUjWDvpxMccUFblwXSpOqO3weFXupVM3kf4l_TQEAC7OwrLppsK0WcOrdGCuuQGptVIXFCI_FhaiKlLoYF3ZMK1wUMnwcs5KGxLrz-Rp3-c9ZbvWMAMt_bqKGfcirDrfv7f25hJ9E3OyRg9edWr19_05CjbiQJpbaQHBlyYnwYkVkNgMzZZ7MEZZL7jLHtcmsEpa2Z9kZaj9kcAFihF0ijdlPxFxXpY2dwmwUN7061T8PM2EGRwfrItnuPqYbWYVE8RXZIjhJhw3X2Ji7rG54O3qI_OGDOgxSqYEU1Kebjo6EN4e7i9BF5G_lWR5g0T1qvlyALpRCMBKpJ-8WhBBk55ithaYmGSPkWoYi19qNikeA3xBm_FGXUDQZvnANoY6Cn_NXbg819m4woVUd8KNDXRY9vPNnuNe8Ys3yVWqaNFMYeOGTF_JU99WdCQ==.svg)

- 4 points plotted.
- Highest count: 46 at event_count.
- Displayed total count: 88.
